productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Gems Black Clutch
description: A perfect option to go with your dresses, this black clutch from lino perros comes with a glossy upper and a spacious inner to hold your party essentials. Dimensions : 14 cm x 24 cm Made of textured fabric with a fabric lining A flap to hold the clutch together with magnetic button closure Crystal embellishments on the front of the flap One main compartment with a pouch Detachable chain strap for ease of carrying Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
